`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
The changes follow a "show, don't hover" principle — dashboard cards should surface key metrics immediately rather than hiding them behind interactions. The `parts.join(' · ')` pattern also gracefully handles optional fields (cost/duration) without conditional JSX blocks.
`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`

Here's what I changed:

**TicketCard badge** — Replaced the opaque `ℹ 12t` hover-tooltip with an inline text readout like `$0.42 · 2m 15s · 12t/47tc`. Key metrics are visible at a glance.

**TicketDetailModal** — Collapsed the 6-card grid (each with borders, padding, uppercase labels) into a single compact bar: `turns 12  tools 47  time 2m 15s  tokens 150.2k/12.3k  $0.42`. Same info, ~55 fewer lines, much less visual weight.

https://github.com/jess-bergs/agent-kanban/pull/16
